title: Costamare declares $0.115 dividend
content:
* Costamare (CMRE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CMRE]) declares $0.115/share quarterly dividend [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20460403-costamare-inc-declares-quarterly-dividend-on-its-preferred-and-common-stock], in line with previous.
 	* Forward yield [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CMRE/dividends/yield?source=news_bullet] 2.71%
 	* Payable May 5; for shareholders of record April 20; ex-div April 20.
 	* See CMRE Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CMRE/dividends?source=news_bullet]

title: Costamare Inc. PFD SER D declares $0.5469 dividend
content:
